title: Customs and Excise (Machinery and Equipment) (Suspension) Regulations, 2019

sections.heading: (1 ) These Regulations may be cited as the Customs and Title and
sections.text:
commence­
Excise (Machinery and Equipment) (Suspension) Regulations, 2019.
ment
(2) These regulations shall come into operation on 1s t January,

sections.heading: 2. (1) The customs duty on the goods set out in the First Suspension of
sections.text:
duty
Schedule and Second Schedule is suspended as set out in the
Schedules.
(2) The suspension of duty specified in the First Schedule and
Second Schedule applies where the goods are imported by a person
who is not a holder of a mining licence for large-scale mining under
the Mines and Minerals Development Act, 2015. Act No. 11 of
2015
(3) A holder of a mining licence for large-scale mining under
the Mines and Minerals DevelopmentAct, 2015 who procures the Act No. 11 of
2015
goods set out in the First Schedule and Second Schedule from a
non-holder of a mining licence for large-scale mining under
subregulation (2) shall declare to the Commissioner General the
goods procured with in thirty days of procuring the goods, and the
duty payable on those goods shall be at the rate payable on the
date of the sale or disposal.
Copies oft his Statutory Instrument can be obtainedf rom the Government Printer,
PO. Box 30136, 10101, Lusaka, Price Kl6.00 each
